items.title: Core pattern: prompt | llm | parser
items.summary: Build once, invoke with a dict. Sean's default style.

items.title: 08 — Joke chain
items.summary: First full pipe: template, llm, StrOutputParser, chain.invoke.

items.title: 09 — Summarization
items.summary: Long passage in, one-sentence summary out.

items.title: 10 — Question answering
items.summary: Answer from context block + question variables.

items.title: 11 — Classification
items.summary: Pick one category from a fixed list.

items.title: 12 — SQL generation
items.summary: Natural language to SQL text only — no database.

items.title: 13 — Role-play bot loop
items.summary: while True + input; one invoke per question.

items.title: PromptTemplate
items.summary: Formatter Runnable; invoke uses a dict, not a raw string.

items.title: StrOutputParser
items.summary: Step 3: normalize model output to plain str.

items.title: RunnableLambda
items.summary: Optional wrapper for .format(); prompt in pipe is enough.

items.title: Trap: format vs invoke
items.summary: Chains use invoke(dict); format is for quick tests.

items.title: Trap: chain is not an agent
items.summary: LCEL generates text; agents pick tools and query data.

items.title: Trap: template wins over question
items.summary: Strong role/tone in template overrides user constraints.
